name: run-prompt-action
description: Run a saved Prompt on a trigger's cadence — the native equivalent of a recurring saved command. The prompt is resolved, rendered through the prompt engine (includes/loops/conditionals), framed as an autonomous run, and executed as an unattended turn. Works on schedule, lifecycle, and event triggers.
author: PersonalClaw

x-meta.label: Prompt
x-meta.help: The saved Prompt to run. Leave empty to run the project's loop.md (then the user-global loop.md) as a default recurring prompt.

x-meta.label: Variables
x-meta.help: Optional render-time variable values for the prompt's {{var}} placeholders.

x-meta.label: Working Directory
x-meta.help: Directory to run in (and where a project loop.md is looked up when no Prompt is set).

x-meta.label: Agent
x-meta.help: Agent to run the prompt as. Empty uses the default agent.

x-meta.label: Session
x-meta.help: Pin a session for continuity across fires. Empty runs a fresh ephemeral session each time.

x-meta.label: Max Turns
x-meta.help: Optional turn cap for the run.

x-meta.label: Model
x-meta.help: Optional model override for the run.

x-meta.label: Dry Run
x-meta.help: Observe-mode replay: write-capable tools return a synthetic observation instead of executing. Useful for testing a trigger safely.
